theory ExistsVerified

begin

// Function signature and definition of the equational theory E

functions: fst/1, pair/2, snd/1
equations: fst(<x.1, x.2>) = x.1, snd(<x.1, x.2>) = x.2

rule (modulo E) Emit:
   [ Fr( ~x ) ] --[ Ping( ~x ) ]-> [ ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

lemma can_ping:
  exists-trace "∃ x #i. Ping( x ) @ #i"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all satisfying traces:
"∃ x #i. (Ping( x ) @ #i)"
*/
simplify
SOLVED // trace found

lemma always_true:
  all-traces "∀ x #i. (Ping( x ) @ #i) ⇒ (Ping( x ) @ #i)"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all counter-examples:
"∃ x #i. (Ping( x ) @ #i) ∧ ¬(Ping( x ) @ #i)"
*/
simplify
by contradiction /* from formulas */

/* All wellformedness checks were successful. */

/*
Generated from:
Tamarin version 1.13.0
Maude version 3.5.1
Git revision: 0234f6a1abee25677c0accef62de0ac2883b0347 (with uncommited changes), branch: HEAD
Compiled at: 2026-07-16 18:33:16.036427196 UTC
*/

end

==============================================================================
summary of summaries:

analyzed: probes/round5/exists_verified.spthy

  processing time: 0.07s
  
  can_ping (exists-trace): verified (2 steps)
  always_true (all-traces): verified (2 steps)

==============================================================================
